name: Essential Massage Therapy

seoDescription: Essential Massage Therapy in Petaluma, CA offers deep tissue, prenatal, hot stone, couples, and aromatherapy massage with custom essential-oil blends

items.title: Deep Tissue Massage
items.description: Focused, firmer pressure that releases chronic muscle tension and knots in the back, shoulders, and neck.

items.title: Aromatherapy Massage
items.description: A relaxing full-body massage paired with a customized blend of essential oils and herbal extracts chosen for you.

items.title: Prenatal Massage
items.description: Gentle, supportive bodywork that eases the aches of pregnancy and helps you rest more comfortably.

items.title: Hot Stone Massage
items.description: Warm stones glide over tight muscles to melt away tension — a deeply relaxing way to finish or feature a session.

items.title: Couples Massage
items.description: Two therapists, one room — unwind side by side with a partner or friend.

items.title: Cupping & Gua Sha
items.description: Traditional add-on techniques that boost circulation and relieve stubborn tension, available with any massage.

sections.heading: A quiet space to restore
body: Essential Massage Therapy is a Petaluma studio built around one idea: a good massage should be tailored to you, not run from a script. Owner and therapist BinBin and the team work with each client to choose the right pressure and technique, whether that means easing deep muscle tension, supporting a pregnancy, or simply unwinding after a long week.

Sessions can be enhanced with custom aromatherapy blends, hot stones, cupping, gua sha, or exfoliation. The room is kept serene and unhurried, and the studio is open seven days a week so it is easy to find a time that works. A second location serves the Santa Rosa area.

items.quote: BinBin was my massage therapist and she was amazing. She was on time, thorough, prompt, considerate, and so skilled at massage.
items.author: Verified review · Petaluma

items.quote: BinBin the owner is so knowledgeable on aromatherapy and cupping — she really knows how to use it and it works.
items.author: Verified review · Petaluma

items.quote: Lucy used hot stones on my back at the end, which is an exceptionally relaxing experience. Both BinBin and Lucy are some of the most skilled and present massage therapists I have been to.
items.author: Verified review · Petaluma
